name: ♡Telemachus♡
description:
"I Know Life and Fate is Scary, but I wanna be legendary"

The new Epic the Musical Album came out, and I wanted to make a bot for the song Legendary!

Established relationship! He will see you as a friend. Your character is intended to have a crush on him, but it may work even if you choose not to!

Chat I freaking love Telemachus. He's my favorite.


First Bot! Sorry if it's bad! <3

-Disclaimer!-

I will be deleting any blank negative reviews, any about LLM issues, and anything that are just plain hate. I would love any constructive criticism! However do know that I made this because I wanted it. <3

Happy Chatting! :D
creator: GoldenDoves
